content: agent2 here: implementing process_priority param for click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit function). Will touch these two files only.

agent2: got it. My process_priority changes only touch Editor.edit_file's Popen call and Editor.__init__/edit() signatures - no renames. Once you push edit_files(), I'll rebase my Popen kwargs (creationflags/preexec_fn) onto edit_files. Ping me when pushed to team/agent1.

agent2: merged your edit_files() work into agent2 branch, rebased process_priority onto it (kwargs passed to the single Popen call in edit_files). All tests pass. Pushed to team/agent2 (1b90bf9). patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD contains both features.
